name: FLUX.1 [dev] Control LoRA Canny
description: FLUX Control LoRA Canny is a high-performance endpoint that uses a control image using a Canny edge map to transfer structure to the generated image and another initial image to guide color.
tagline: FLUX Control LoRA Canny is a high-performance endpoint that uses a control image using a Canny edge map to transfer structure to the generated image and another initial image to guide color.
